title: Can You Spot a Fair Value Gap? 🧠 ICT Quiz
description: Think you know ICT trading? Test yourself on fair value gaps — the #1 thing funded traders use that beginners miss. Most people get this wrong. Do you? Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT concepts that actually make sense.
script: Stop. 73% of funded account failures trace back to missing THIS one concept. Think you know it? Let's find out. Quick quiz. A fair value gap forms when... A) price hits a support level. B) three candles leave an imbalance. C) volume spikes at a high. Which one? It's B. Three candles. A gap between candle one's high and candle three's low. Smart money always comes back to fill it. Always. Now you know what funded traders look for. Follow R2F Trading. New ICT concepts every single day.
